message:
Simplify release workflow (#5620)

## Summary

Streamlines the release workflow by leveraging tenzir-changelog
features:

- Replace manual version input with bump type dropdown (minor/patch
only)
- Remove title input (uses default "Tenzir Node vX.Y.Z")
- Use `--minor`/`--patch` flags for version computation
- Use `--commit` flag to atomically commit and tag
- Use `--no-latest` flag for backport releases
- Add separate `release-major.yaml` workflow for major releases (calls
main workflow)

### Workflow Structure

- **release.yaml**: Main workflow with `workflow_dispatch` (minor/patch
dropdown) and `workflow_call` (reusable)
- **release-major.yaml**: Thin shim that calls release.yaml with `bump:
major`

This separation prevents accidental major releases while keeping all
logic in one place.

## Dependencies

This PR depends on tenzir-changelog improvements that need to be
implemented first:

| Feature | Flag | Purpose |
|---------|------|---------|
| Auto-commit | `--commit` | Commit staged changes before tagging |
| Latest control | `--no-latest` | Prevent backports from becoming
"Latest" |
| Version output | - | `release create` outputs version to stdout |

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,22 @@
+name: Release (Major)
+
+on:
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      description:
+        description: |
+          Description of the release
+
+          The description of the release should be 1-2 sentences long, must be
+          written in active voice, and should clearly communicate the theme of
+          the release to the user. Use full sentences and avoid abbreviations.
+        required: true
+        type: string
+
+jobs:
+  release:
+    uses: ./.github/workflows/release.yaml
+    with:
+      bump: major
+      description: ${{ inputs.description }}
+    secrets: inherit
